zh.lifeSummary: Richard Fairfax是Sir John Fairfax和E MRS JOHN FAIRFAX的兒子，於1150年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁。他於1169年與Eustachia Carthrope在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1205年在英國英格蘭越可爾曼諾享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾吉爾林 易亞斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Fairfax was born in 1150, in Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir John Fairfax and E MRS JOHN FAIRFAX. He married Eustachia Carthrope in 1169, in Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1205, in Manor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Gilling East, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Fairfax est né en 1150, à Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir John Fairfax et E MRS JOHN FAIRFAX. Il a épousé Eustachia Carthrope en 1169, à Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1205, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Gilling East, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fairfaxは1150年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングでSir John FairfaxとE MRS JOHN FAIRFAXの息子として生まれた。1169年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングでEustachia Carthropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1205年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアギリング エアストにて埋葬された。

ko.Gilling East, Ryedale District, North Yo: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 길링 이스트
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fairfax(은)는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩에서 Sir John Fairfax(와)과 E MRS JOHN FAIRFAX의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩에서 Eustachia Carthrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 먼어에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 길링 이스트에 묻혔다.

ru.Gilling East, Ryedale District, North Yo: джиллинг эаст, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Richard Fairfax родился в 1150 г. в местности еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir John Fairfax и E MRS JOHN FAIRFAX. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustachia Carthrope в 1169 г. в местности еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1205 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности джиллинг эаст, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
